zh.lifeSummary: 當Milon VIII de Noyers於從1213年1月8日到1214年1月7日出生在法國皮卡迪奧易諾時，他的父親Milon VII de Noyers29歲，母親Agnès de Brienne25歲。他於1245年與Alixent Hélissende des Barres在法國皮卡迪奧易諾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於從1271年1月8日到1272年1月7日在法國布格阿瓦隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Milon VIII de Noyers于从1213年1月8日到1214年1月7日出生在法国皮卡迪奧易諾时，他的父亲Milon VII de Noyers29岁，母亲Agnès de Brienne25岁。他于1245年与Alixent Hélissende des Barres在法国皮卡迪奧易諾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于从1271年1月8日到1272年1月7日在法国布格阿瓦隆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Noyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Bowyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

nameMeanings.name: Milon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from the numerous places so called, a large number of which get their name from Old English mylentūn ‘settlement with a mill’. Others were originally named as ‘the middle settlement (of three)’, from Old English middel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The surname is most famous as that of the poet John Milton ( 1608–74 ), and the given name is sometimes bestowed in his honour. Its most illustrious bearer in recent times has been the economist Milton Friedman ( 1912–2006 ).

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Milon VIII de Noyers was born from 8 January 1213 to 7 January 1214, in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France, his father, Milon VII de Noyers, was 29 and his mother, Agnès de Brienne, was 25. He married Alixent Hélissende des Barres in 1245, in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died from 8 January 1271 to 7 January 1272, in Avallon, Yonne, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Milon VIII de Noyers est né du 8 janvier 1213 au 7 janvier 1214, à Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Milon VII de Noyers, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Brienne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alixent Hélissende des Barres en 1245, à Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé du 8 janvier 1271 au 7 janvier 1272, à Avallon, Yonne, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Milon VIII de Noyers von 8. Januar 1213 bis 7. Januar 1214 in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Milon VII de Noyers 29 und seine Mutter Agnès de Brienne 25. Er hat 1245 in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich Alixent Hélissende des Barres geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb von 8. Januar 1271 bis 7. Januar 1272 in Avallon, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Milon VIII de Noyers è nato il da 8 gennaio 1213 a 7 gennaio 1214 nel Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Milon VII de Noyers, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Brienne, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alixent Hélissende des Barres nel 1245, nel Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì da 8 gennaio 1271 a 7 gennaio 1272, nel Avallon, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Milon VIII de Noyersがから1213年1月8日まで1214年1月7日にフランスピカーディオイゼノイオンで生まれた時，父Milon VII de Noyersは29歳，母Agnès de Brienneは25歳であった。1245年にフランスピカーディオイゼノイオンでAlixent Hélissende des Barresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼はから1271年1月8日まで1272年1月7日にフランスボウルゴグンイオンエイヴァロンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Milon VIII de Noyers(이)가 1213년 1월 8일부터 1214년 1월 7일까지 프랑스 피카디 이스 노욘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Milon VII de Noyers(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Brienne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1245년 프랑스 피카디 이스 노욘에서 Alixent Hélissende des Barres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 1월 8일부터 1272년 1월 7일까지 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 아발런에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Milon VIII de Noyers nasceu de 8 de janeiro de 1213 a 7 de janeiro de 1214, em Noyon, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Milon VII de Noyers, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Brienne, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alixent Hélissende des Barres em 1245, em Noyon, Oise, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu de 8 de janeiro de 1271 a 7 de janeiro de 1272, em Avallon, Yonne, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Milon VIII de Noyers родился с 8 января 1213 по 7 января 1214 в местности ноен, оис, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Milon VII de Noyers было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Brienne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alixent Hélissende des Barres в 1245 г. в местности ноен, оис, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер с 8 января 1271 по 7 января 1272 в местности аваллон, енн, бургогн, Франция.

Se casó con Alixent Hélissende des Barres en 1245, en Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas.
